name: TR PDF Converter
description: Native Trade Republic PDF parser — extracts cash transactions, money market funds, and trading P&L. Direct import to Donkeyfolio activities with quantity + unit price. Includes Holdings Diagnostics panel and self-healing portfolio watcher: auto-detects new stock splits, ticker migrations, and DRIP gaps that happen AFTER your last PDF import. Ported from @jcmpagel's open-source converter.
author: Donkeyfolio

permissions.purpose: Add a sidebar entry and a route for the TR PDF converter page
Find or create the 'Trade Republic' account for direct import
Smart auto-import: create() per unique ISIN to register asset profiles, then import() bulk for the rest. Eliminates the wizard's manual Review Assets step.
Trigger Rebuild History after a successful import so the Performance chart, TWR and historical valuations populate immediately without the user having to dig into Settings → Market Data.
Trigger market data sync after import so newly-created assets get historical quotes from Yahoo Finance — required for the Performance chart, current prices, and Holdings valuation to be accurate.

(v2.13.0) Read Donkeyfolio's cached historical quotes for crypto assets to compute qty for TR 'Compra direta' rows when Yahoo's chart API is rate-limiting (HTTP 429). Donkeyfolio's market sync already maintains daily closes for BTC/ETH/SOL/ADA/XRP/etc., which we use as a fallback to make the crypto direct-buy resolver resilient to Yahoo throttling.
(v2.13.0) Look up asset_id for crypto symbols (BTC, ETH, SOL, ADA, XRP) so the resolver can fetch cached quotes via quotes.getHistory(assetId) instead of hitting Yahoo.
Save the generated CSV / JSON exports to disk via the system save dialog (Tauri webview blocks the standard <a download> trick)
